creator: jason.mann@protonmail.com
text:
Additional issues with libiconv, when attempting to uninstall it, in
case it's related:


root@atom:/usr/ports/converters/libiconv # make deinstall distclean
===>  Deinstalling for converters/libiconv
===>   Deinstalling libiconv-1.13.1_1
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/lib/libiconv.so.3' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/libdata/charset.alias' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package `libiconv-1.13.1_1'
(perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)
===>  Cleaning for libtool-2.4.2
===>  Cleaning for libiconv-1.13.1_1
===>  Deleting distfiles for libiconv-1.13.1_1
